item.title: China And India Might Not Watch The World Cup 🤯
Russia Could End The War 🤯
Real Madrid Is A Mess 🤯
🚨 Dark Reality No One Talks About | Dr.Sunitha Krishnan | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.

Watch this telugu podcast trailer to experience a conversation that is honest, intense, and deeply relevant in today’s world. The Dark Reality Hidden in Society #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #socialawareness
item.description:
This episode of a powerful telugu podcast on lazymuscle brings forward a conversation that many avoid but urgently needs attention. Hosted by rohith gollena as part of the RRRshow, this discussion with Sunitha Krishnan explores the psychology, societal patterns, and uncomfortable realities surrounding harmful behaviors toward children. Instead of sensationalism, this episode focuses on awareness, prevention, and understanding the root causes that society often ignores. For a Telugu-speaking audience, this podcast breaks down complex issues in a relatable and impactful way, making it one of the most important conversations in the telugu podcast space today.
Sunitha Krishnan shares deep insights from her years of experience working on the ground, explaining how such behaviors are not limited to stereotypes and how they can exist in environments people trust the most. This episode highlights the importance of education, awareness, and early conversations within families and communities. The discussion also sheds light on psychological conditioning, social silence, and the need for proactive measures to protect children. As part of the lazymuscle podcast ecosystem, this content aligns with meaningful storytelling that creates awareness while remaining informative and engaging.
Through this RRRshow episode, rohith gollena brings a structured and thought-provoking conversation that helps listeners understand warning signs, societal triggers, and preventive steps. The podcast emphasizes how awareness is the first step toward change and why ignoring these conversations only worsens the problem. This telugu podcast is crafted to resonate with youth, parents, educators, and anyone interested in understanding deeper social issues that affect future generations.
This episode stands out among telugu podcasts because it focuses not just on the issue but also on solutions, awareness strategies, and mindset shifts required to build a safer society. The discussion encourages listeners to think critically, question assumptions, and become more responsible individuals in their communities. With growing interest in meaningful and educational podcasts, this episode positions lazymuscle and RRRshow as platforms that bring real, impactful conversations to the forefront.
If you are looking for a telugu podcast that goes beyond entertainment and dives into real societal challenges, this episode delivers valuable insights. It combines storytelling, expert perspective, and awareness-driven content that aligns with what audiences are actively searching for in the podcast space. From understanding psychological aspects to recognizing social responsibility, this episode creates a complete awareness narrative for listeners.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #childsafety #awarenesspodcast #socialissues #youthawareness #indianpodcast #telugucreator #mentalhealthawareness #educationmatters

item.title: 💔Very heart breaking #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
What happens in the shadows of society often remains unseen, unheard, and deliberately ignored. In this deeply important episode of the telugu podcast RRRshow by lazymuscle, host rohith gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan for a powerful and eye-opening conversation that uncovers disturbing realities many people are unaware of. This episode explores the hidden systems of exploitation, the misuse of vulnerable children, the psychology behind abuse networks, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and action.
Sunitha Krishnan, one of India’s most respected voices in social justice and human rights advocacy, shares years of frontline experience fighting against human trafficking, child exploitation, and abuse. Through this conversation, she reveals how silence, ignorance, and social stigma continue to enable exploitation. She explains the patterns society often fails to recognize, how vulnerable communities become targets, and why education and collective responsibility are essential to creating change.
In this intense and thought-provoking telugu podcast, rohith gollena asks difficult but necessary questions about the systems that allow exploitation to continue. The discussion focuses on child safety, trafficking awareness, rehabilitation efforts, survivor dignity, legal challenges, and the role families, institutions, and society must play in prevention. Rather than sensationalizing these issues, this RRRshow episode aims to educate viewers and create meaningful awareness.
This episode is especially important for parents, educators, young adults, and anyone who wants to better understand the realities hidden beneath surface-level discussions. Sunitha Krishnan breaks down myths, exposes uncomfortable truths, and emphasizes why awareness is the first step toward protection. Her insights challenge viewers to think critically about responsibility, justice, and how communities can stand against abuse.
The conversation also explores how exploitation often thrives through manipulation, systemic neglect, and the normalization of silence. Sunitha shares powerful perspectives on rehabilitation, restoring dignity to survivors, and creating long-term structural change. Her words serve as both a warning and a call to action for anyone who believes in building a safer society.
If you value meaningful conversations that go beyond entertainment, this lazymuscle RRRshow episode delivers one of the most essential discussions on social awareness, child protection, and human dignity. Watch this telugu podcast till the end and share it to help spread awareness. Conversations like these are not easy, but they are necessary.
This episode of RRRshow with rohith gollena is part of lazymuscle’s commitment to bringing impactful, educational, and socially relevant discussions to Telugu audiences. Through real conversations with changemakers like Sunitha Krishnan, this telugu podcast creates space for awareness, truth, and transformation.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #childsafety #humantraffickingawareness #socialjustice #awarenesspodcast #telugucontentcreator #indianpodcast #youthawareness #publicawareness #meaningfulconversations #childprotection

item.title: 👏well said sir ! #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this powerful episode of the telugu podcast series by lazymuscle, host Rohit Gollena sits down with renowned life coach Ram Jaladurgam for a deep and thought-provoking conversation on the idea that “Life Is a Test.” This episode explores how every challenge, failure, emotional breakdown, success, relationship, and decision in life becomes a test of character, patience, mindset, discipline, and self-awareness. If you are searching for motivation in Telugu, mindset transformation, emotional clarity, self-development, or practical life lessons that truly connect with real-life struggles, this conversation will resonate with you on a personal level. Fans of RRRshow, motivational podcasts, Telugu self-help content, and meaningful life conversations will find immense value in this episode featuring rohith gollena and Ram Jaladurgam. Throughout this inspiring discussion, Ram Jaladurgam shares valuable insights on handling stress, overcoming fear, building confidence, mastering emotions, and understanding why difficult phases are often the biggest turning points in life. Instead of escaping problems, this episode encourages viewers to understand the deeper purpose behind pain, pressure, rejection, failure, and uncertainty. The conversation dives into mental strength, personal growth, success habits, spiritual awareness, emotional intelligence, and the importance of self-discipline in today’s fast-moving world. This telugu podcast is designed for students, entrepreneurs, professionals, fitness enthusiasts, and anyone who feels stuck, lost, emotionally drained, or confused about their life journey. Host Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle brings a grounded and relatable perspective that makes this episode both engaging and highly practical for Telugu-speaking audiences. The chemistry between rohith gollena and life coach Ram Jaladurgam creates an authentic and honest discussion that goes beyond surface-level motivation. Instead of generic advice, this podcast focuses on real experiences, mindset shifts, psychological patterns, consistency, habits, self-respect, focus, and the inner battles people face silently every day. item.title: 🙏🏻✨WHAT A CREATION #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this engaging episode of the RRR Show, host Rohit Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Lifeorama Sujith to explore the fascinating history, mysteries, and spiritual significance of the Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy Temple. This telugu podcast dives deep into one of the richest and most mysterious temples in India, located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. Known for its hidden vaults, ancient traditions, and immense wealth, the temple continues to intrigue historians, भक्तులు, and curious minds across the world. If you are interested in Indian temples, history, spirituality, and untold stories, this episode brings you valuable insights in a simple and engaging format.
Throughout this conversation, Rohit Gollena and Lifeorama Sujith break down the origins of the Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy Temple, its connection to Lord Vishnu, and the significance of the deity in the Anantha Shayanam posture. The discussion also touches on the temple’s royal heritage, the Travancore kingdom, and the controversial unopened vaults that have sparked global curiosity. This RRRshow episode is designed to give listeners a balanced perspective, combining facts, cultural beliefs, and logical analysis, making it perfect for both believers and skeptics.
This lazymuscle podcast episode is crafted especially for Telugu-speaking audiences who love deep discussions, knowledge-sharing, and thought-provoking topics. Whether you are a devotee seeking spiritual understanding or someone curious about the secrets behind India’s richest temple, this episode offers something valuable for everyone. The storytelling approach keeps you hooked while delivering informative content that enhances your understanding of Indian heritage and temple architecture.
If you enjoy telugu podcast content that blends history, mystery, and meaningful conversations, don’t forget to watch till the end. Rohith Gollena brings his unique style of questioning and analysis, making this episode of RRRshow both entertaining and educational. Stay tuned for more such insightful discussions from lazymuscle, where knowledge meets curiosity in the most engaging way possible.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: I tested Dream Tech with my Biggest Fans!
item.description:
This experience touched me so much, especially seeing how overjoyed the families were to see their kids happy - so we turned this video into a fundraiser - every dollar raised from this video will go straight to Make-A-Wish, alongside anything else you can spare too!
Kids like Kurgan and Pradyumna go through more than we can even imagine but wishes like these can give them strength and hope!
Thanks to @MakeAWishUK for reaching out and making this happen!

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: Heated Rivalry
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Heated Rivalry.

Two hockey players must decide if there is room in their fiercely competitive world for real love.

item.title: Scrubs (2026)
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scrubs (2026).

Old friends JD and Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time, learning that medicine has changed; interns have changed; but their bromance has stood the test of time.

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.
